title: Senior Doctor - Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies:
Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic Digital Technologies!
